/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/gateway_main.c.o CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/gateway_platform_macos.c.o "CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/Users/work/code/ESP-Miner-Gateway/gateway/src/gateway_core.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gateway.dir/Users/work/code/ESP-Miner-Gateway/gateway/src/wslink.c.o" -o gateway  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/libwebsockets/4.5.7/lib/libwebsockets.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /opt/homebrew/Cellar/cjson/1.7.18/lib/libcjson.dylib -lpthread
